title: AI Named the 2026 FIFA World Cup Winner (Shocking Prediction)
summary: AI Master is a platform that allows users to run multiple large language models side-by-side in a single interface for comparison. The video demonstrates using it to send identical World Cup 2026 prediction questions to Claude Opus, GPT-5.5, and Gemini 3.5 Flash simultaneously, enabling "live stress testing" of AI reasoning on speculative forecasting tasks.
writeup: The video demonstrates AI Master, a platform that runs multiple large language models side-by-side in one interface for direct comparison. It sends an identical 2026 FIFA World Cup prediction prompt to Claude Opus, GPT-5.5, and Gemini 3.5 Flash at the same time, framing the exercise as live stress testing of model reasoning on a speculative forecasting task. The setup matters because it shows how the same speculative question surfaces differences in how each model reasons about an inherently uncertain outcome.
